home.title: The Risk-First Operating System for Prop Traders
home.lead: Glitch helps you protect accounts, scale replication, and execute with context. If your process is serious, your tooling should be too.
home.sublead: From single-account evaluations to high-account-count operations, Glitch unifies compliance enforcement, replication, analytics, and performance intelligence in one assistant layer.
home.whyFailTitle: Why accounts fail, even with good strategy
home.whyFailP1: Most losses are not from lacking ideas. They come from avoidable operational errors: wrong account, wrong size, rule drift, replication mismatch, or no context when volatility spikes.
home.whyFailP2: Glitch was built to solve that layer first. Think of it as your mission-control assistant for disciplined prop trading workflows.
home.growLead: Start with protection. Upgrade to paid access when you want scale, deeper signal context, and higher-account-count operations. Pro includes a risk-free 7-day free trial.
home.freeTitle: Core protection, no credit card pressure
home.goProTitle: Scale, context, and control for serious operators
home.pricingTitle: Pricing that respects how traders actually buy
home.pricingLead: Free for proof. Pro includes a risk-free 7-day free trial, then flexible billing when you want premium power. Lifetime access when Glitch becomes part of the business.
